Title: Insert New Plant Record
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Data:
- Valid plant name: "Rose"
- Valid plant description: "A beautiful flowering shrub."
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the plant insertion page.
2. Enter the plant name "Rose".
3. Enter the plant description "A beautiful flowering shrub.".
4. Submit the form.
Expected Result:
- The plant record is successfully inserted into the database.
- Confirmation message is displayed to the user.

Title: Read Plant Records
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the plant reading page.
2. Search for the plant name "Rose".
3. Click on the search result.
Expected Result:
- The details of the plant "Rose" are displayed.
- No errors occur during the read operation.

Title: Sign In User
Preconditions: User account exists.

1. Navigate to the authentication page.
2. Enter the email "test@example.com".
3. Enter the password "password123".
4. Click on the sign-in button.
Expected Result:
- The user is signed in successfully.
- Confirmation message is displayed to the user.

Title: Sign Up New User
Preconditions: User account does not exist.
Test Data:
- Valid email: "newuser@example.com"
- Valid password: "password123"
- Confirm password: "password123"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the authentication page.
2. Click on the sign-up button.
3. Enter the email "newuser@example.com".
4. Enter the password "password123".
5. Confirm the password "password123".
6. Click on the create account button.
Expected Result:
- The new user account is created successfully.
- Confirmation message is displayed to the user.

Title: Identify Plant Species Using AI
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the camera page.
2. Take a photo of a plant.
3. Upload the photo "rose.jpg".
4. Request plant species identification from Gemini AI API.
Expected Result:
- The plant species is identified correctly.
- The identified species is stored in Firebase Storage.
- Confirmation message is displayed to the user.

Title: Retrieve Personal Storage Path
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main application page.
2. Request personal storage path from Firebase Storage.
Expected Result:
- The personal storage path is retrieved successfully.
- Confirmation message is displayed to the user.

Title: Download Photos for Each Species
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.

Title: Update Password
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Data:
- Current password: "oldpassword"
- New password: "newpassword123"
- Confirm new password: "newpassword123"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the authentication page.
2. Click on the change password button.
3. Enter the current password "oldpassword".
4. Enter the new password "newpassword123".
5. Confirm the new password "newpassword123".
6. Click on the update password button.
Expected Result:
- The password is updated successfully.
- Confirmation message is displayed to the user.

Title: Invalid Token Authentication
Preconditions: User is not authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. Main process requests token from LocalUser.
2. LocalUser attempts to authenticate with invalid token.
Expected Result:
- Authentication fails due to invalid token.
- Error message is displayed to the user.

Title: Null Token Authentication
Preconditions: User is not authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. Main process requests token from LocalUser.
2. LocalUser attempts to authenticate with null token.
Expected Result:
- Authentication fails due to null token.
- Error message is displayed to the user.

Title: Invalid Photo Upload
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the camera page.
2. Attempt to upload an invalid photo file "invalidfile.txt".
3. Request plant species identification from Gemini AI API.
Expected Result:
- The upload fails due to invalid file format.
- Error message is displayed to the user.

Title: Retrieve Nonexistent Personal Storage Path
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main application page.
2. Request personal storage path from Firebase Storage.
3. Assume the personal storage path does not exist.
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed indicating the personal storage path does not exist.
- Confirmation message is displayed to the user.

Title: Download Nonexistent Photos
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main application page.
2. Request photos for each species present from Firebase Storage.
3. Assume no photos are present for any species.
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed indicating no photos are available.
- Confirmation message is displayed to the user.
